input.tenant_message: The light fixture in my dining room stopped working. I changed the bulb and it still doesn't turn on. When I look up inside the fixture I can see that one of the wires has come loose — it's just hanging there not connected to anything. I don't want to touch it myself.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a licensed electrician to re-secure the loose wire inside the light fixture and restore power. Turn off the circuit breaker for the dining room as a precaution until the repair is completed. This is a straightforward repair with no immediate safety hazard since the fixture is not energizing, but it should be addressed within the week.
